# ROracle Setup

After installing Oracle Instant Client following the SOP EGIS\\Support\\\_files\\Software\\Oracle\\InstantClient\\Oracle Instant Client Install SOP.docx") before closing out of the "Environment Variables" editor, create one new environment variable called "OCI-LIB64" and point it to your instance of instant client (C:\\Oracle\\instantclient_23_8)

Then, navigate to the ROracle folder under EGIS\\Support-files\\Software\\Oracle\\ROracle\\\_20250718 for the latest version, set that as your working directory, and call `install.packages()` to install Oracle

```{r, eval = FALSE}
setwd("EGIS/Support_files/Software/Oracle/ROracle_20250718/ROracle_1.5-0")
install.packages("ROracle", repos = NULL, type = "source")
```

Thats all!
